add.requirement_reference: POST /api/v1/cart/items (Add product, default quantity: 1) from story_summary.json
add.description: Document POST /api/v1/cart/items endpoint for adding products to cart with default quantity behavior.
add.reason: Required by story; missing in LLD.

add.requirement_reference: GET /api/v1/cart (Retrieve items, individual subtotals, and cart total) from story_summary.json
add.description: Document GET /api/v1/cart endpoint for retrieving cart contents, subtotals, and cart total.
add.reason: Required by story; missing in LLD.

add.description: Document PUT /api/v1/cart/items/{itemId} endpoint for updating cart item quantity.
add.reason: Required by story; missing in LLD.

add.requirement_reference: DELETE /api/v1/cart/items/{itemId} (Remove item from cart) from story_summary.json
add.description: Document DELETE /api/v1/cart/items/{itemId} endpoint for removing cart items.

add.requirement_reference: Automatic recalculation of subtotal and total upon any quantity mutation from story_summary.json
add.description: Document automatic recalculation logic for cart subtotal and total when item quantity changes.

add.requirement_reference: Empty cart state must trigger specific UI redirection ('continue shopping' link) from story_summary.json
add.description: Document empty cart state handling and UI redirection logic.
add.reason: Required by story; missing in LLD.

add.requirement_reference: CartItem (Entity containing Product Reference, Quantity, and current Price Snapshot) from story_summary.json
add.description: Document CartItem entity with required fields and price snapshot logic.

add.description: Document Quantity Updater Component for modifying item quantities in cart.

modify.current_state: ShoppingCart entity exists but lacks explicit session/user binding.
modify.required_change: Add userId/sessionId binding and cart lifecycle states.
modify.reason: Story requires ShoppingCart bound to user session or ID.

modify.current_state: Components documented but not mapped to Cart View Interface and 'Add to Cart' Handler.
modify.required_change: Explicitly map architectural components to story presentation layer needs.
modify.reason: Story requires Cart View Interface and Add to Cart Handler.

modify.required_change: Add cart-specific error scenarios and response schemas.
modify.reason: Story requires robust cart operation error handling.

modify.required_change: Add cart-specific validation for quantity, product availability, price consistency, cart size/value limits.
modify.reason: Story requires cart integrity and validation.

modify.current_state: Dependencies documented but not specific to cart-product catalog integration.
modify.required_change: Clarify cart-product catalog integration, API contracts, caching, and fallback behavior.

delete.description: Checkout, payment processing, and order placement logic.
delete.reason: Out of scope for Shopping Cart Management story; belongs to separate stories.
Story requires server-side cart persistence bound to user session or ID.
